name: Autumn
summary: 2You share what you have, with little regard to your own needs.
bonuses: 1If someone is in need, you never withhold aid.
2You share what you have, with little regard to your own needs.
3There are no simple meals, only lavish feasts.
4You stock up on fine food and drink. You hate going without such comforts.

traits.name: 4You stock up on fine food and drink
traits.summary: You hate going without such comforts.
